# remnawave_billing_node (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave infra billing node.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "remnawave_infra_provider" "example" {
  name = "Provider Co"
}

resource "remnawave_billing_node" "example" {
  provider_uuid   = remnawave_infra_provider.example.uuid
  next_billing_at = "2027-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `next_billing_at` (String) Next billing date (ISO 8601 datetime).
- `provider_uuid` (String) UUID of the infra provider.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Optional display name.
- `node_uuid` (String) UUID of the associated node (optional).

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
